title: Funk Music Discs [FMD]
description: Change The Music Disc Sound To A Funk Songs That Can be Used In Servers or Single Player
body:
# **About**
**A Resource Pack That Changes The game Discs Sound To Funk Songs For Fun (Cuz Whay Not?)**
## **Servers**
**You Can Use This On Any Server By Upload The Resource Pack To the Server And install the Plugin [Muisc ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/bukkit-plugins/music) Or [This One](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/30348).**
## **Notes** 
- All the Discs Names Are Change In The Game
- Some Of the Discs Might Changed With The Time (Cuz They Become Old) to fallow the Trend
- Full change log list in version from 0.0.6 check [this](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSQaxKPb6AC9dyFxzaVS3ZmkvQ1VoQxZUBmhVUfT3NW7ZqM3sYlZJCDi_VpTDJ6CSNW9BE0tSHadL41/pubhtml#gid=1183559230)
- if you got suggestions/issues/requests check the [Github](https://github.com/AhmedShah29/Funk-Music-Discs-FMD) page
## **Copyright & License**
I am the creator of this resource pack. All modifications, file structure, and visual design are made by me.

**The music tracks used in this pack are owned by their original creators.**  
I do not claim ownership of any of the songs.  
Monetization applies only to the resource pack itself (structure and effort), not the music.

**If any copyright holder requests removal, I will take action immediately.**  
This pack is intended for personal, in-game use only.

© AhmedShah – All rights reserved for the resource pack content
